edgeCases: Hardware: Linux + NVIDIA GPU detection (requires NVIDIA hardware)
Hardware: Linux + AMD GPU detection (requires AMD hardware)
Hardware: Windows platform GPU detection (requires Windows OS)
Hardware: Intel Mac with discrete GPU (requires Intel Mac)
Hardware: Virtual machine GPU detection behavior
Hardware: Multi-GPU systems (only first GPU detected in M1)
Profiles: Scoring algorithm doesn't prioritize specificity - when multiple profiles match with same normalized score, first one wins instead of most specific
Profiles: Concurrent test execution causes timing issues due to shared cache file
Profiles: No test for actual successful CDN fetch - all tests rely on 404 fallback
Profiles: No test for cache update when cache is fresh (< 7 days old)
